Name: Climatech Saudi
Description:
With over 20 years of experience, Climatech Saudi Arabia has established itself as one of the pioneer companies in the market in the implementation of Renewable Energy systems and air treatment solutions.
Climatech has accomplish this by virtue of its experienced and high skilled team of in Saudi Arabia that are committed to focus on the design and construction of each individual project - right down to the smallest of details. 

Our solutions are divided into two main categories. Solar energy solutions which include solar water heating systems, solar photovoltaic systems, solar street lights, solar water pumping systems, smart urban development (solar benches, solar advertising board, solar air conditioners and electric vehicles chargers). Second is air treatment such as humidification and dehumidification solutions.

DESIGN – Each system is meticulously designed by a team of highly skilled and experienced professionals, who have designed a number of solar systems in the Middle East and Gulf Countries.

SUPPLY – We use only the leading materials available in the world with top classified manufacturers. All materials used are tested and evaluated to the highest possible standards and overextended periods of time.

EXECUTION - The process of installing and integrating solar systems demands experience and tested skills. Our work force deals, on a daily basis, with the construction and implementation of renewable energy systems and air treatment solutions in Saudi Arabia and Middle East and considered as the most experienced available in the region.

SERVICE AND MAINTENANCE – Climatech works closely with each client to ensure that the system operates consistently and reliably. We realize that a system that is expected to operate without fault for many years needs prompt and professional support. We always ensure a positive customer journey throughout every project and aim to exceed our customers’ expectations at every stage.

Name: Arce Clima
Description:
Excelencia técnica y compromiso global en soluciones electromecánicas integrales.

En Arce Clima, desde hace más de 30 años, ofrecemos soluciones especializadas en el diseño, ejecución y mantenimiento de instalaciones electromecánicas, abarcando climatización, electricidad, protección contra incendios, control y regulación. Nacimos con un enfoque técnico claro y, con el paso de los años, hemos evolucionado para dar respuesta a las necesidades más exigentes del sector, posicionándonos como un socio de referencia en proyectos de media y gran envergadura.

Nuestra propuesta de valor se basa en una visión integral del proyecto. No solo ejecutamos instalaciones: también ofrecemos servicios de ingeniería y mantenimiento especializado, acompañando al cliente en todas las fases del ciclo de vida de sus infraestructuras. Esta capacidad de gestión global, unida a un firme compromiso con la calidad, la innovación y el cumplimiento de plazos, nos ha permitido consolidar relaciones duraderas con empresas líderes a nivel nacional e internacional.

Contamos con un equipo multidisciplinar altamente cualificado y una estructura organizativa flexible que nos permite adaptarnos a distintos entornos y sectores: retail, industrial, logístico, sanitario, hotelero, entre otros. Además, nuestra presencia internacional sigue creciendo gracias a una estrategia sólida y a la confianza de nuestros clientes, con proyectos ejecutados en más de 20 países.

En Arce Clima trabajamos con una mentalidad orientada a resultados. Nuestra misión es clara: aportar soluciones eficientes, sostenibles y de alta calidad técnica, contribuyendo al éxito de cada proyecto con una actitud proactiva y un fuerte sentido de responsabilidad.

-Industries du bois

Description:
Hal hazırda № 1 olan Gree Electric Appliances Inc. soyutma şirkəti 60 milyondan çox yaşayış və yüngül ticari kondisionerlər, 5.5 milyon mərkəzi kondisionerlər istehsal gücünə və illik 2.2milyard dollar dövriyyəyə sahibdir.
Azərbaycanda GREE ticari kondisonerlərin rəsmi nümayəndəsi “Buxar Mühəndislik” şirkətidir. Şirkət 1996-cı ildə təsis edilib.
Şirkət 45 illik iş təcrübəsinə əsaslanaraq 2016 cı ildən Çin Xalq Respublikasının ən böyük və eyni zamanda istehsal gücü baxımından dünyanın ən böyük, kondisioner istehsalçısı olan GREE Electric Appliances Zhuhai’nin rəsmi distribyutoru olmuşdur. İstehsalçı hər bir tələbi qarşılamaq üçün geniş çeşidliliyə sahib yüksək keyfiyyətli və etibarlı məhsulları ilə tanınır.
Gree Electric Appliances Inc. texnologiyanın təkamülü və inkişafina fokuslanan fəlsəfəyə malikdir. Bizim məhsullar və istehsal sistemi hərtərəfli qiymətləndirilir və həmçinin komponentlər və istehsalatın keyfiyətinə ciddi nəzarət olunur. İnnovasiyalar şöbəsinin 400-dən çox laboratoriyasında 3000-dən çox patent alınmışdır və təxminən 6000 alim və texnik işçi işləyir.
Yüksək keyfiyyətli məhsul yüksək keyfiyyətli komponentlər və ciddi xüsusiyyətlərdən ibarət olur. Kompanentlərin tam olaraq 100%-i montajdan qabaq test olunur. Eyni zamanda istehsalın keyfiyyətinə nəzarətə xeyli vəsait qoyulur. CE, TUV, GS, UL, SASO, OHSAS, ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and EUROVENT standartlarına, eyni zamanda ətraf mühitin mühafizəsi üçün IECQ, ROHS və s. sistemlərə sahibdir.
Şirkət son dərəcə rəqabətli olan bazara liderlik edə bilmək üçün, bazarı daimi olaraq izləməkdədir. Ən əsas məqsədimiz müştərilərin marağını artırmaq, gəlirlərini təmin etmək və əla müştəri servisi təqdim etməklə onlarla uzun müddətli iş münasibətləri quraraq Azərbaycan bazarına liderlik etməkdir.

Name: REQ Energy Solutions
Description:
At REQ Refrigeration, our mission is to provide air conditioning services and installations with respect, excellence, and quality. These principles are not only reflected within our company’s name, but are evident in all we do, from product selection and installation, to building lasting relations with our valued customers.

Respect: We believe that respectful and honest business practices start with communication and transparency. REQ Refrigeration understands the value of hard-earned money, which is why we will never rely on pushy sales gimmicks to make a quick buck. We build trust through honesty, accountability, and providing service and products that are carefully tailored to fulfil our clients' needs.

We also strive to be considerate of our customers’ time and are not only punctual, but reply to any queries within the same day during business hours. We treat our clients' properties with respect, and always leave a site exactly the way we found it. Finally, our understanding of respect encompasses the communities in which we live and work. This is why we have made it our goal to be a business that gives back by offering sponsorships and benefits to local non-profit organisations.

Excellence: As experts in our field, we hold ourselves and each other to the highest standard of excellence in workmanship. We strive to remain on the cutting edge of our industry and emphasise the importance of continually evolving knowledge and experience.

We are not salesmen, but technicians committed to supporting our clients through honest advice and an unmatched quality of work. We are timely, skilled, enthusiastic, and always willing to go the extra mile for our clients' needs. We pride ourselves on giving our customers the confidence to make educated choices that reflect their own circumstances and requirements.

HOE GAAN WE TE WERK?

Overweegt u om airconditioning te laten installeren? De zaakvoerder komt vrijblijvend bij u langs om u op maat te kunnen adviseren.

Στα πλαίσια αυτά η εταιρεία μας έχει την δυνατότητα να αναλάβει και να εκτελέσει έργα σχετικά με την δραστηριότητά της σε κτίρια, γραφεία, εκθέσεις, βιομηχανικούς χώρους, νοσοκομεία, ειδικούς χώρους και cleanrooms (εργαστήρια, χειρουργεία, φαρμακοβιομηχανίες, μικροηλεκτρονική, εργοστάσια υψηλής τεχνολογίας) κ.λ.π. καθώς και την τεχνική υποστήριξη αυτών.

Name: Cool Master Airconditioning & Heating LLC
Description:
A family owned and managed business with the aim to serve Houston’s homeowners & customers with all their air-conditioning and heating needs.

With 30 years of gained experience in designing and building customized air-conditioning and heating systems for oil and gas fields worldwide, we bring this knowledge and expertise to aid in combat against Houston’s ever changing weather conditions, we deliver the comfort levels our clients and homeowners deserves.

Each of our Customers shall be managed as a special case with full attention to the smallest details, so as that the end result will excel beyond anticipation achieving homeowner satisfaction.

HVAC systems are dynamic & responsive systems that react and responds to their surrounding input variables that the house is exposed to such as external weather conditions (Heat, Cold, wind, rain, humidity), as well internal elements such as lifestyle, health, number of occupants and their ages and many other factors, also the external exposure of the house and the Type of construction.


If these elements and factors are not accounted and evaluated when designing and sizing the Airconditioning and heating system the system installed will not fulfil and achieved what it supposed to, ending with unsatisfied customer/homeowners. Improper system design weather oversized or undersized will bring its impact to the property and homeowners will have to bear the consequences,

1. Oversized system will have higher CAPEX and higher monthly energy bill. With many side effects, improper humidity control, inappropriate cooling and heating, and high noise levels, etc
2. Undersized system, air-conditioning and heating system will run continuously leading to extremely high energy bill, improper inhouse comfort levels including Inappropriate cooling/dehumidification, low airflow for the some of the spaces, and subsequently shorter equipment life span.

WHY DO YOU NEED TO TAKE THE RISK. DO IT RIGHT FROM THE FIRST TIME

Name: Cool Breeze
Description:
Cool Breeze | Supplying Sustainable Cooling Solutions Since 1964

For over 60 years, Air-Dale Engineering (Pty) Ltd has been a trusted leader in evaporative cooling across Southern Africa. As the exclusive distributor of Cool Breeze systems for more than three decades, we are proud to offer innovative, energy-efficient solutions that deliver exceptional performance while reducing environmental impact.

At Cool Breeze, we believe cooling should be effective, economical, and environmentally responsible. Our evaporative cooling systems use nature’s most efficient resource — water — to create fresh, clean, and comfortable air without relying on chemical refrigerants. The result is a smarter, more sustainable way to cool homes, businesses, and industrial spaces.

We work closely with a growing network of distributors and contractors throughout Southern Africa, supplying:
	•	High-quality evaporative cooling units and spare parts
	•	Full accessory ranges, including ducting, diffusers, and plenums
	•	Technical manuals, system design assistance, and on-site support
	•	Dealer resources, marketing tools, and loyalty incentives

Our team combines decades of experience with ongoing innovation to ensure every partner receives the knowledge, service, and products needed to succeed. Whether designing a large-scale commercial installation or advising on residential cooling solutions, we deliver reliable systems backed by expert technical support.

Choosing Cool Breeze means partnering with a company that values long-term relationships, product quality, and environmental responsibility. Together with our distributors, we’re shaping a future of cleaner, more efficient cooling across the region.

In terms of installation time and usability Freo-Pipe is an extraordinary innovation in the world of A/C systems and specifically of splits connection.

- Freo-Pipe is a revolutionary multi-layer polymer tube that makes the use of the copper pipe “expired”, due to its very special features, and so it becomes its best alternative.

- Freo-Pipe installation speed is surprising: even in the most complex systems it only takes a few, easy, steps to create a complete and functional connection.

- Freo-Pipe allows you to work in complete safety either for its components certified quality, and for the chance to create a connection “on demand”, ie adapting it to your needs.

- Fold it and unfold it, roll it and bend it: FastPipe resists to the most extreme tests without showing the signs!

ÜBER UNS:

Die HSB Heat Storage Berlin GmbH wurde 2022 gegründet, um zuverlässige und preiswerte Hochtemperaturspeicher für die Versorgung unserer Kunden mit CO2-freier Wärme zu entwickeln und herzustellen.

Die Gründer sind Unternehmer mit langjähriger Erfahrung in der Entwicklung nachhaltiger Energietechnologien. Unser starkes Team wächst mit der fortschreitenden Produkt- und Geschäftsentwicklung weiter.

Auf dem Gelände des ehemaligen Flughafens in Tegel im Innovationszentrum .GUT Berlin, entwickelt die HSB einen wichtigen Baustein für die Energieversorgung der Zukunft.

Mit dem Bau unseres Demonstrators konnten wir die Leistungsfähigkeit unsere Technologie unter Beweis stellen. Auf dieser Basis entwickeln wir unser Produktkonzept weiter.

Für unsere nächsten Entwicklungsschritte suchen wir Partner und Pilotkunden, die ihre Wärmeversorgung mit uns CO2 frei und zukunftssicher verändern wollen.

Comfee Jordan is a subsidiary of Comfee International, which is a Chinese company that is one of the leading manufacturers of air conditioners in the world. Comfee International has a global presence, with operations in over 100 countries.

Comfee Jordan was established in 2016. They have since become one of the leading air conditioner retailers in Jordan. They have a network of over 100 dealers and distributors across the country.

Comfee Jordan is committed to providing their customers with the best possible products and services. They offer a one-year warranty on all of their air conditioners. They also have a team of qualified technicians who can provide installation and maintenance services.

If you are looking for an air conditioner in Jordan, Comfee Jordan is a great option. They offer a wide range of products, competitive prices, and excellent customer service.

Here are some of the features of Comfee air conditioners:

Energy efficient: Comfee air conditioners use less energy than traditional air conditioners, which can save you money on your energy bills.
Quiet operation: Comfee air conditioners are designed to operate quietly, so you can enjoy a comfortable and peaceful environment.
Self-cleaning function: Comfee air conditioners have a self-cleaning function that helps to keep the unit clean and free of bacteria.
Remote control: Comfee air conditioners come with a remote control so you can easily adjust the temperature and settings from anywhere in the room.
If you are looking for an energy-efficient, quiet, and comfortable air conditioner, Comfee is a great option.

Name: Greenclima Ingenieria Ltda.
Description:
Somos una empresa conformada por Ingenieros formados en la Universidad de Santiago de Chile. Nuestro campo para ofrecer a nuestros clientes son principalmente: El Desarrollo de proyectos de Calefaccion Central y Aire Acondicionado, así como también su Mantención, Suministro y Montaje.

Enfocada en sistemas Domiciliarios y Comerciales.

Aire Acondicionado: Mantenimiento predictivo y correctivo, Suministro y montaje de Sistemas uno a uno con refrigerantes ecológicos. Equipos con compresor Inverter, mas eficiente en consumo eléctrico y convencionales on-off.  Tambien sistemas de enfriamiento de agua por Chiller con unidades terminales Fan-coil.

Calefacción Central: Suministro y montaje de sistemas cerrados de agua caliente, conformado por un generador de calor (Caldera mural o de pie dependiendo de la potencia térmica a instalar) y emisión de calor aportado a través de radiadores o piso/losa radiante.

Estamos comprometidos con realizar instalaciones y evaluaciones con el cuidado del medio ambiente de acuerdo a normativas para reducir las emisiones de HCFC a la atmósfera, poniendo énfasis en el proceso de recuperación de refrigerantes durante mantenciones que involucran su utilización. Apuntamos a instalar sistemas que generen el menor consumo eléctrico posible en su operación, desde el diseño del sistema de acuerdo a las necesidades del cliente.

Name: Van gucht BV
Description:
Van Gucht, gevestigd in Puurs-Sint-Amands, staat voor betrouwbare én vooruitstrevende oplossingen op het gebied van klimaatregeling. Als ervaren installateur in centrale verwarming, ventilatie, airconditioning, VRV-systemen én warmtepompen, zijn wij dé partner voor totaalprojecten in HVAC. We realiseren duurzame installaties voor woningen, appartementen, kantoren, winkelruimtes, projecten en bedrijfsgebouwen. Daarnaast kan je ook voor kleinere projecten en losse installaties bij ons terecht.

• Warmtepompen – energiezuinige en milieuvriendelijke verwarmingsoplossingen, ideaal voor lage temperatuurverwarming en hybride systemen met zonneboilers.
• Centrale verwarming & gasinstallaties – erkend Cerga-gasinstallateur. Wij voeren gaskeuringen zelf uit, wat wettelijke zorgeloosheid en veiligheid biedt.
• Airconditioning, ventilatie & VRV-systemen – (Very-Regulated-Variable) slimme klimaatregeling: flexibel, efficiënt en schaalbaar.
• Onderhoud & herstellingen – een belangrijke pijler van onze werking: preventief onderhoud en snelle herstellingen voor maximale bedrijfszekerheid.
• HVAC-totaalprojecten – van advies en ontwerp tot installatie en service, volledig afgestemd op de noden van particulieren, bedrijven en projectontwikkelaars.

Met een team van gespecialiseerde installateurs en ervaren techniekers combineren we technische know-how met een klantgerichte aanpak. Klanten waarderen onze snelle oplossingen, professionele service en betrouwbare ondersteuning.

We luisteren naar jouw specifieke noden, kiezen de oplossing die past bij je doelstellingen en voeren installaties zorgvuldig én conform regelgeving uit. Naast advies, ontwerp en realisatie hechten we veel belang aan onderhoud en service na verkoop. Zo blijven je installaties optimaal presteren, jaar na jaar.

Klaar om jouw woning, project of bedrijfsruimte toekomstbestendig én comfortabel te maken? Neem dan contact op:
Van Gucht, Hemelrijken 16, 2890 Puurs-Sint-Amands

شرکت چکاد انرژی از بدو تاسیس مطالعات گسترده ای در زمینه ی استفاده از روش های نوین صنعت تهویه مطبوع آغاز نمود.نتایج حاصل از مطالعات انجام شده از یک سو و تجربیات اجرائی با روش های متداول از سوی دیگر همراه با افزایش متقاضیان مسکن باعث گردیده که شرکت چکاد انرژی بتواند در برآوردن خواسته های طیف وسیع مشتریان نسبتا موفق عمل نماید.

این شرکت از ابتدای تاسیس در فروشگاه و دفتر طراحی مهندسی مجاور آن به وسعت 200 متر مربع مستقر گردیده و علاوه بر بخش فروشگاه ، سایر بخشهای مدیریت ، طراحی و حسابداری به ارائه خدمات به مشتریان و کارفرمایان محترم مشغول می باشند.

شرکت چکاد انرژی همواره سعی نموده با ذخیره مناسب تجهیزات عمومی سیستمهای سرمایشی ، گرمایشی و نیز ادوات و و سائل مورد نیاز بخش تعمیرات رضایت مشتریان محترم را کسب نماید.

Name: Serwas
Description:
Bei Serwas machen wir digitale Infrastruktur zum Teil der Energiewende. Unsere Systeme nutzen die Abwärme von Servern, um Gebäude effizient, nachhaltig und kostengünstig zu beheizen. Was heute in Rechenzentren ungenutzt verpufft, wird bei uns zur wertvollen Wärmequelle für Haushalte und Betriebe.

Wir haben mit einer ersten skalierbaren Lösung begonnen: der Nutzung von Mining-Servern als Wärmequelle. Damit verbinden wir digitale Rechenprozesse mit realer Heizleistung und schaffen ein Heizsystem, das sowohl wirtschaftlich als auch klimafreundlich ist.

Unser Ziel ist es, diese Technologie weiterzuentwickeln – von Mining-Systemen hin zu GPU- und KI-Servern, deren Abwärme in Zukunft einen zentralen Beitrag zur Wärmeversorgung leisten kann. Mit dem wachsenden Bedarf an Rechenleistung steigt auch das Potenzial, digitale Energie sinnvoll zu nutzen.

Serwas steht für eine Zukunft, in der Wärme nicht verschwendet, sondern intelligent genutzt wird. Gemeinsam mit Partnern, Installationsbetrieben und frühen Anwender*innen gestalten wir eine neue, dezentrale und emissionsfreie Art des Heizens.

Wärme neu gedacht. Energie neu verbunden. Digital. Nachhaltig. Lokal.

Description:
Daikin is the world's largest air conditioning manufacturer. Founded in 1924, it is active in 150 countries and engaged primarily in heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration (HVACR) equipment. 

Over the last 20 years, Daikin has significantly developed its commercial systems field, managed under the independent Daikin Applied division, which coordinates all of the group’s activities relating to hydronic HAVC systems - chillers, air handling units, and fan coils.

Daikin Applied has been represented in Israel by the Polak Group since 2018. The Polak Group is one of the largest electromechanical groups in Israel, representing more than 40 international manufacturers of industrial brands combined with a comprehensive service platform that ranges from engineering, to project quality assurance and lifetime technical services.

Daikin’s line of industrial chillers includes air-cooled and water-cooled chillers for use in platforms with scroll, screw, centrifugal, and magnetic compressors. They accommodate a wide output range, from 4kW (domestic applications) to 21,000kW (industrial facilities).

Daikin is known for offering highly efficient systems that are especially compact and quiet to run, thanks to the expert utilization of the most advanced technologies on the market.

Dodatkowo, firma oferuje profesjonalne usługi w zakresie wykonywania precyzyjnych odwiertów w betonie i żelbetonie, co stanowi kluczowy element przy instalacji systemów klimatyzacyjnych i wentylacyjnych, a także w realizacji różnorodnych projektów budowlanych i remontowych. Wykorzystując zaawansowany sprzęt i techniki wiercenia, VIMMO gwarantuje najwyższą jakość wykonania, minimalizując jednocześnie zakłócenia i wpływ na istniejące konstrukcje.

Misją firmy VIMMO jest dostarczanie innowacyjnych, niezawodnych i przyjaznych dla środowiska rozwiązań, które poprawiają jakość życia i pracy, a jednocześnie przyczyniają się do ochrony naszej planety. Firma cieszy się uznaniem na rynku dzięki swojemu profesjonalizmowi, elastyczności w dostosowywaniu oferty do indywidualnych potrzeb klientów oraz nieustannemu dążeniu do doskonałości w każdym aspekcie swojej działalności.
